topics: Expected Standard: Personal safety precautions in a workplace applied correctly
"Design a Safety Plan for a Community Event"
You are part of the team organizing a National Skills Competition to be held at your school.
The event will take place in your school hall and is expected to attract over 500 participants.

lessons.title: Identify potential safety hazards associated with the event (e.g., overcrowding,
Research and incorporate school regulations and Health standards related to event
Develop a detailed safety plan that includes:
Emergency safety protocols
Communication strategies for attendees, staff, and emergency responders
Risk mitigation measures (e.g., crowd control barriers, first aid stations)
Present your safety plan to the Skills organizing committee, justifying your decisions
